channel.title: GitHub HolyC Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of HolyC in GitHub

item.title: Zeal-Operating-System/ZealOS
item.description: The Zeal Operating System is a modernized fork of the 64-bit Temple Operating System, TempleOS.

item.title: cia-foundation/TempleOS
item.description: Talk to God on up to 64 cores. Final snapshot of the Third Temple.
